name: Bendigo And Adelaide Bank Limited
analysis: BEN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$10.6600, stop A$9.8505, target A$13.0885 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
